key_issues: GREEN-LIGHT — implementation-ready. All four iteration-001 critical gaps resolved with falsifiable tests.

C1 resolved: make-message-extra-info + make-transport-send-options now define/contract (cite auth.rkt:81); rejection tests check-exn exn:fail:contract? for #:session 42, #:auth non-auth-info, #:related-request-id 'sym, #:resumption-token non-string (AC 79/80/91/92, Testing Part 6).
C2 resolved: partial-transport stub omitting transport-send + check-exn exn:fail? proves default-raise (AC 87, Testing Part 3).
C3 resolved: on-message captures both args, invoked with real make-message-extra-info, check-pred message-extra-info? + 3 field accessors, plus #f-extra path (AC 89, Testing Part 4).
C4 resolved: transport-send 2-arg AND 3-arg both check-not-exn; string AND exact-integer related-request-id accepted-and-ignored (AC 88, Testing Part 2).
Minors resolved: zero-arg make-message-extra-info all-#f (AC 90); session-field TS-divergence documented in Decisions (line 245).

Non-blocking hints (no new iteration needed): define-generics optional-arg mechanism for transport-send opts (C4 test will catch a wrong choice); prefer check-pred exn:fail? on the on-error captured arg; cosmetic AC92 (#:resumption-token 42) vs Testing Part6 (99) mismatch — both non-strings, harmless.
No regressions: provide surface, L0/L1 imports, prerequisites, R2 size all intact.
